title: Softly Salted Thai Tofu Satay
description: A fresh and chewy Thai street food dish featuring salt-baked tofu, perfect for a satvik-friendly meal

ingredients.name: extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the tofu pieces in a single layer.
Bake the tofu for 20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Meanwhile, heat the shortening in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the bruised lemongrass and sliced galangal to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the peanut oil, salt, chili flakes, and coconut milk to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the baked tofu to the skillet and toss to coat with the sauce.
Transfer the tofu to a serving platter and sprinkle with toasted peanuts and lime juice.
